title: Ability to disconnect multiple boards at once in the connect boards column
excerpt: In the connect boards settings you have the option to disconnect boards but you can only do it one at a time. On top of that, there’s a processing time of like 10s before the disconnection occurs and the settings window …

posts.author: bob1 (bob)
posts.cookedHtml:
In the connect boards settings you have the option to disconnect boards but you can only do it one at a time. On top of that, there’s a processing time of like 10s before the disconnection occurs and the settings window closes by itself. So it takes at least 15 seconds per board to disconnect because of the waiting, closing and reopening.

Earlier today I had to remove 180 connections. That’s roughly 180x0.25min=45min of work. 45min just to disconnect a few boards. It’s unacceptable.

So the suggestion is simple: add a little checkbox in front of the disconnect button so that we can select multiple boards to disconnect at once.

posts.author: JackieN (JackieN)
posts.cookedHtml: This is so badly needed. I cannot fathom why the current process was set up to be so slow and tedious.
